posts.author: Zak.harris (Zak Harris)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to have the ability to send automated emails using an email address that is stored on a connected board.

To explain the scenario:

I have a Project Board and a Contractor Board.

These boards are connected, allowing me to link contractors to specific projects.

When inviting contractors to tender for a project, I can see their contact information via the connection; however, I am unable to use the information in automations.

What are you trying to achieve

I would like to have the ability to send automated emails using an email address that is stored on a connected board.
